question:
I'm preparing a PR to Megatron-LM. According to the linting-and-formatting skill: (a) what is the exact bash command that runs autoformat.sh in check-only mode (without rewriting files), and (b) what is the configured maximum line length in characters (from the skill's Code Style Rules section)? Reply with exactly these two lines and nothing else:
Check command: <full bash command>
Line length: <number>
ground_truth:
Check command: BASE_REF=main CHECK_ONLY=true SKIP_DOCS=false bash tools/autoformat.sh
Line length: 119
expected_behavior: Names the autoformat.sh check command with BASE_REF=main, CHECK_ONLY=true, and SKIP_DOCS=false env vars
Names the 119-character line length rule (not 80, not 100, not 120)
